python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
for name in ('mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out.log', 'mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-error.log'):
    p = Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs') / name
    print('--- ' + name + ' ---')
    if not p.exists():
        print('missing')
        continue
    for line in p.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()[-30:]:
        print(line.encode('ascii', 'ignore').decode())
